hardcoded_credentials.description: Detects plaintext secrets and known token patterns in node parameters.

hardcoded_slack_webhook.description: Detects Slack incoming webhook URLs embedded in workflow parameters.

missing_credential_binding.description: Integration nodes must reference n8n Credentials instead of inline secrets.

placeholder_credentials.description: Reminds operators to bind PLACEHOLDER credential IDs after import.

public_webhooks.description: Webhook triggers must have authentication validation within the workflow graph.

missing_error_handling.description: Production workflows should define an error workflow or include an Error Trigger.

insecure_http.description: External HTTP endpoints must use HTTPS.

dangerous_code_execution.description: Flags risky patterns in Code nodes (eval, child_process, etc.).

shell_execution_nodes.description: Execute Command nodes are blocked in production templates.

execution_settings.description: Recommends explicit executionOrder in workflow settings.
